notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas flies out sharply to center fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Lars Nootbaar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Lars Nootbaar grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Pavin Smith. Alec Burleson out at 2nd. Lars Nootbaar out at 1st.
